prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "9A. Controls and Procedures" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 9B. Other Information".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 9A's text:
- If the "Item 9B" heading is visible on this page, Item 9A ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 9A runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 9A at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text: degree of compliance with the policies or procedures may deteriorate.
